title: Bad performance with DISTINCT GROUP BY
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test.table1 (a INT, b VARCHAR(255), c DATE, d FLOAT, PRIMARY KEY (a, b));
SELECT a, COUNT(DISTINCT b) FROM test.table1 GROUP BY a;
SELECT a, COUNT(b) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a, b FROM test.table1 WHERE c IS NOT NULL) AS t GROUP BY a;
SELECT a, COUNT(DISTINCT b) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a, b FROM test.table1 WHERE d > 1.0) AS t GROUP BY a;
SELECT a, COUNT(*) FROM test.table1 GROUP BY a;
key_bug_features: Bad performance with DISTINCT in GROUP BY queries
